name: Francesca Salierno
title: Managing Director
bio: Executive Director and Founder of DCGG. Qualified lawyer with significant experience in policy advisory, regulatory strategies and managing the development of European legislation. DCGG EU Transparency Register: 757388947637-84. Company number: 0751.842.941. On reduced capacity from March 2026.

name: Joshua Townson
title: Head UK Policy & Global Strategy · Interim Manager
bio: Head of UK Policy and Global Strategy. Joined from HM Treasury; previously led startup policy and membership engagement at Innovate Finance. Expert in FCA/BoE engagement and stablecoin policy. Interim co-manager from 2 March 2026.

name: Małgorzata Owczarska
title: Head of Engagement · Interim Manager
bio: Senior Advisor EU Parliamentary Relations and Head of Engagement. Experienced in-house counsel specialising in public and regulatory law at EU and national levels. Former judge and adviser at Polands EU Representation. Interim co-manager from 2 April 2026.

name: Jörn-Jakob Röber
title: Head EU Policy
bio: Head of EU Policy. 20+ years of experience leading EU and national-level public and regulatory policy at Commerzbank, Trustly, and Visa. Moderator at European Blockchain Convention (EBC10). Currently leading DCGG counter-narrative on ECB multi-issuance concerns and ESM sovereignty framing. Key MiCA review engagement lead.

name: Mina Iotova
title: Policy Advisor
bio: Policy Advisor (Wider Team). Primary author and final reviewer of Crypto and Privacy consultation responses. Expert in EU MiCA, FCA stablecoin rules and Privacy/Chat Control policy. Birthday: 25 March.

name: António Garcia Rolo
title: Senior Consultant
bio: Senior Consultant. Portuguese lawyer and academic. Experience in financial supervision law, corporate and financial law, with special focus on blockchain and Web3 law and policy. ELTE Budapest lecturer. FATF analysis lead.

name: Timothy Shin
title: Government Relations Asia & Korea
bio: Government Relations Asia and Korea. Co-authored first Korean blockchain tokenisation book. Joined DCGG 12 January 2026. Delivered HK FSTB/SFC OTC briefing for Tether (Jun 2025) — USDT OTC win for professional investors. Leads Seoul National Assembly seminar (May 12 2026).

name: Soha Ragab
title: MENA Policy
bio: MENA Policy specialist. Part-time Tue/Wed/Thu. CBUAE Innovation Hub and UAE engagement lead.

name: Nick Drury
title: MENA & Asia Support
bio: MENA and Asia policy support. UAE regulatory engagement and DFSA relations.

name: Breitner Nyantika
title: Head Africa Policy
bio: Head Africa Policy. Close to 10 years regulatory experience working with the Capital Markets Authority (CMA) Kenya on Crypto and AI related policy and regulatory projects. Leads DCGG across Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Rwanda, South Africa, Botswana, Namibia, Mauritius, Zambia and emerging markets.

name: Hugo Rodriguez
title: Head Wider LatAm Policy
bio: Head of Wider LatAm Policy. Lawyer specialising in Corporate, Tax, Administrative, Fintech and Banking Law, Compliance and Risk Management. Admitted to Buenos Aires Bar in 2005. Primary lead for Argentina (CNV), Uruguay (BCU), Bolivia, Paraguay and wider LatAm strategy. Navigating post-LIBRA scandal political environment ahead of Oct 2025 Argentine elections.

name: Bellini Balduino
title: Head Brazil Policy
bio: Brazil policy specialist. BCB consultation lead (Consultations 109/110/111).

name: Larissa Sena
title: Head Brazil Policy
bio: Brazil policy specialist, working alongside Bellini on BCB regulatory engagement.

name: Carolina Rojas Muñoz
title: Junior Policy — Colombia
bio: Junior Policy Analyst for Colombia. Joined 6 January 2026. Bill 510/2025 focus.

name: Marvin Mobio
title: Head Strategy & Innovation · BD
bio: Head of Strategy and Innovation. Business development specialist with expertise in blockchain, finance, and tech startups. Previously worked at Amazon and Revolut. Leads DCGG AI outreach programme and BD pipeline.

name: Norberto de Andrade PhD
title: Head of AI / Senior Advisor AI Policy
bio: Head of AI / Senior Advisor AI Policy. Tech policy executive, entrepreneur, and law professor with 20+ years of international experience spanning government, academia, and industry. Intellectual architect of DCGG AI vertical. QVAC/DeAI lead for Tether. Co-authored INSEAD NFT report launched at Houses of Parliament. PhD researcher. EU AI Act focus areas: AI Agents liability, Open Source AI, Decentralised AI, Blockchain-based AI Infrastructure.

name: Maira Aivalioti
title: AI Policy & Strategy Lead
bio: AI Policy and Strategy Lead. Joined 30 March 2026. Contact: maria@dcgg.eu

name: Sam Daniels
title: HR and Operations
bio: HR and Operations lead. Manages all admin, finance coordination, and team operations. Internal point of contact for holiday tracking, invoices and team logistics.

name: Aleksandra Kowal
title: HR and Admin Coordinator
bio: Admin and Operations specialist in Brussels. Coordinates events, Seoul seminar logistics, and team admin. Birthday: 13 February.

name: Fathima Calia
title: Personal Assistant
bio: PA to Francesca. Also runs DCGG AI BD outreach programme. Joined 20 January 2026.

name: Wiktoria Bocheńska
title: Admin & AI Support
bio: Admin and DCGG AI support in Brussels. Moderated February 5 AI event Panel 1.

name: Adelina Gerenska
title: Stakeholder Analyst
bio: Admin support. Remote.

name: Head of Asia
title: Public Affairs & Regulatory Strategy (Asia)
bio: Open position. Singapore or HK preferred. Recruitment in progress — 5 candidates shortlisted. Target start: Q3 2026.
